
### exercise: different pipeline  {.smaller}

<!-- \lstset{
    language=myasm,
    morekeywords={mrmovq,irmovq,rmmovq,rrmovq,addq},
    moredelim=**[is][\btHL<2|handout:0>]{~2~}{~end~},
    moredelim=**[is][\btHL<4|handout:0>]{~3~}{~end~},
} -->
 

* split execute into two stages: F/D/E1/E2/M/W
* result only available near end of second execute stage
* where does forwarding, stalls occur?
 ![](/pipeline/texfig/diffHazEx.figure.svg)


### exercise: different pipeline 

<!-- \lstset{
    language=myasm,
    morekeywords={mrmovq,irmovq,rmmovq,rrmovq,addq},
    moredelim=**[is][\btHL<2|handout:0>]{~2~}{~end~},
    moredelim=**[is][\btHL<4|handout:0>]{~3~}{~end~},
} -->
 

* split execute into two stages: F/D/E1/E2/M/W
 

::: {.r-stack}
![](/pipeline/texfig/diffHazExSoln.figure-1.svg){.fragment .fade-in-then-out fragment-index=1}

![](/pipeline/texfig/diffHazExSoln.figure-2.svg){.fragment .fade-in-then-out fragment-index=2}

![](/pipeline/texfig/diffHazExSoln.figure-3.svg){.fragment .fade-in-then-out fragment-index=3}

![](/pipeline/texfig/diffHazExSoln.figure-4.svg){.fragment .fade-in-then-out fragment-index=4}

![](/pipeline/texfig/diffHazExSoln.figure-5.svg){.fragment .fade-in-then-out fragment-index=5}


:::
